intro: Between April 13 and 27, 2026, ZCyberNews published 12 articles on enterprise security, led by coverage of CVE-2026-27681, a critical vulnerability with a CVSS score of 9.9. The reporting also highlighted CVE-2025-54987, another critical flaw rated 9.8. The articles detailed four critical and four high-severity issues, alongside one medium and two informational entries. Affected sectors included technology, financial services, healthcare, enterprise, and government, with impacts observed globally, particularly in Europe and North America.
